title: AiT Plus
description: An addon mod for AiT that aims to add stuff from doctor who related media!
body:
# THIS PROJECT IS ABANDONED, [AIT EXTRAS](https://modrinth.com/mod/ait-extras) IS THIS MOD BUT BETTER!


### Required Mods!

- Requires AiT 1.0.5 and above -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ait/version/1.0.5-1.20.1-release)

- Requires Celectial 2.0 - 1.20-1.20.2 -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/celestial/versions?g=1.20.1&l=fabric)

- Requires Huge Structure Blocks 1.0.9 - 1.20-1.20.4 -> [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/huge-structure-blocks/version/1.0.9)
-----------
# Q&A

### What does this add?

- A bunch of stuff from doctor who

### Why does it only work on 1.0.5 and above?
  
- AiT 1.0.5 is the latest public version (at the time) and has features that are requried for the certain things to work, these features weren't present in previous versions of the mod.

### Will this mod be ported to forge or neoforge?    
  
- No, even though ait has a forge version, this mod will be exclusivly for fabric. Why, i dont want to make 2 versions of the mod / port it to forge every version.

-----------

Any questions or want to make a suggestion join the [AiT Addons discord server!
]([https://discord.gg/RFqpNGrPkY](https://discord.gg/RFqpNGrPkY))

Betas Avalible Here [CLICK ME](https://ko-fi.com/addi3dabaddie)
